# cycloid_environment_type (Data Source)

Look up a single Cycloid environment type by canonical.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cycloid_environment_type" "production" {
  canonical = "production"
}

output "production_color" {
  value = data.cycloid_environment_type.production.color
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `canonical` (String) Canonical of the environment type to look up.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) The organization canonical to look up the environment type in. Defaults to the provider's `default_organization`.

### Read-Only

- `color` (String) Color associated with this environment type.
- `environments_count` (Number) Number of environments currently using this type.
- `id` (Number) Internal numeric ID assigned by the Cycloid API.
- `is_default` (Boolean) True for built-in environment types that cannot be renamed or deleted.
- `name` (String) Display name of the environment type.
